reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros y buenos baños públicos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service from the beach attendants and good public restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMk9YVWRREAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio normal con un parquecito con mesas para descansar. Muy amplia y muy bien atendida tanto en la playa como en el shop. Cómodo el acceso en ambos sentidos de la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
A typical gas station with a small park and picnic tables. Very spacious and with excellent service both at the pumps and in the shop. Convenient access from both directions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncUp2aEtBEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Mala predisposición de los playeros. La atención deja mucho que desear. Los baños siempre están sucios y huelen constantemente.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants' disposition is unwelcome. The service leaves much to be desired. The bathrooms are always dirty and constantly smell.
